title: Stunning Interior Transformation: Fresh Paint & Cabinet Revival
description: RL Peek Painting recently completed a stunning interior painting project in the prestigious Tuhaye community, transforming a home’s aesthetic with exper
body: RL Peek Painting recently completed a stunning interior painting project in the prestigious Tuhaye community, transforming a home’s aesthetic with expert craftsmanship. Our team revitalized the walls with fresh, high-quality paint, enhancing the interior’s warmth. The highlight of this project was the cabinet transformation, where we meticulously refinished worn, pock-marked wood into a smooth, elegant cream finish. This upgrade not only modernized the kitchen but also added a timeless, high-end appeal to the entire space. With attention to detail and premium materials, we ensured a flawless, durable result that seamlessly complements the home’s luxurious interior. At RL Peek Painting, we specialize in interior painting and cabinet refinishing, delivering professional results that elevate your home’s beauty and value. Whether you need a full interior refresh or a specialized cabinet makeover, our experienced team provides expert guidance and precision execution. Using top-tier paints and finishes, we create stunning transformations that stand the test of time. If you're looking to enhance your home with expert cabinet painting, refinishing, or interior painting services, contact RL Peek Painting today to schedule a consultation and bring your vision to life.

title: Giving Back To The Community
description: RL Peek Painting and the Young Men’s Service League recently revitalized the Park City Senior Center’s dining room with a fresh, carefully chosen coat
body: RL Peek Painting and the Young Men’s Service League recently revitalized the Park City Senior Center’s dining room with a fresh, carefully chosen coat of paint. Spearheaded by Marianne Cone, a member of the center’s board of trustees, the project aimed to brighten up the space and create a more welcoming environment for the senior community. Bob Peek, owner of RL Peek Painting, donated his time and expertise, ensuring the painting was done professionally while mentoring volunteers. With contributions from Benjamin Moore and Sherwin Williams, who provided paint and equipment, the effort came together in just eight hours over a weekend, making a dramatic transformation from the dark brown paneling of 1976 to a fresh, modern look. Volunteers, including local mothers and sons from the Young Men’s Service League, worked tirelessly under Peek’s supervision, mastering the techniques of painting panel grooves, achieving crisp lines, and ensuring full coverage. The impact of the Park City Senior Center makeover was immediate and deeply appreciated by its members. Seniors like Linda McReynolds and Sean Marron praised the new, lighter color, which enhanced the space and created a more inviting atmosphere. “Just wait until the sunlight comes in—it makes me feel good,” said McReynolds, reflecting on the change. The volunteers took pride in their work, knowing that their efforts would bring joy to the center’s visitors for years to come. Bob Peek emphasized the value of community-driven service projects, stating, “This is what I’ve done in Park City for 39 years, and it’s my way of giving back.” The project not only refreshed the senior center but also provided the young volunteers with a valuable life skill and a lasting sense of accomplishment. As Peggy Fletcher described it, the newly painted room was a “fresh renewal”, reinforcing the power of teamwork and local generosity in transforming community spaces. Read More Here: https://www.parkrecord.com/2025/03/05/park-city-senior-center-lights-up-under-a-fresh-coat-of-paint/

title: Complete Exterior Wood Stain and Front Door Refinish in Hideout
description: Our painting experts recently completed a full exterior wood staining and refinishing project in Park City, Utah. The home featured wood siding that had b
body: Our painting experts recently completed a full exterior wood staining and refinishing project in Park City, Utah. The home featured wood siding that had begun to fade from sun exposure and mountain weather. Our team carefully cleaned, prepped, and applied a premium exterior stain to bring new life to the house and provide long-lasting protection against UV and moisture damage. All exterior trim, fascia, and soffits were refinished to create a clean, consistent look across the home. The front entry door was fully restored — sanded, stained, and sealed — to bring back its original look. The finished result is a refreshed, high-end exterior that enhances curb appeal and protects the home for years to come. Services Provided: Exterior Wood Staining • Trim Refinishing • Front Door Restoration • Exterior Painting If you’re looking for more information about the latest projects completed by our Park City painting contractors, please call 435-649-0158 or complete our Online Request Form today.

The natural wood tones were restored and protected, enhancing the home’s curb appeal while preserving its mountain-modern aesthetic.

body: Our crew recently completed a detailed exterior repaint of metal light fixtures on a luxury home in Park City, Utah. title: Full Exterior Stain Transformation | Modernizing a Home From Dark, Outdated Color to Contemporary Style

body: We recently completed a full exterior staining project that transformed a home in Kamas with an old, dark, and outdated finish into a clean, modern, and contemporary showpiece. It started with a thorough estimate by Bob, continued through multiple color consultations with Kim, and was executed to perfection by the team of Bernardo, Chris, and Kevin. title: Elegant China Cabinet Repaint | Precision Interior Painting
description: This Park City project involved the complete repainting of a custom china cabinet, executed with an elevated level of detail to match the surrounding high
body: This Park City project involved the complete repainting of a custom china cabinet, executed with an elevated level of detail to match the surrounding high-end interior. Our team focused on achieving a smooth, furniture-grade finish that enhanced the cabinet’s architectural lines while preserving its original character. The process began with meticulous surface preparation, including thorough cleaning, degreasing, light sanding, and precise masking to protect adjacent surfaces. We addressed minor imperfections to ensure a flawless foundation before applying premium coatings designed for cabinetry and fine interior millwork. Each coat was applied with controlled technique to achieve a silky, uniform finish with exceptional durability. Special care was taken around glass panels, interior shelving, and detailed trim to maintain crisp lines and a refined appearance. The result is a china cabinet that feels custom-built, seamlessly integrated into the space, and visually elevated without appearing over-finished. This project is a strong example of our approach to detailed cabinetry & wood refinishing—where craftsmanship, restraint, and precision come together to deliver a finish that enhances both the function and aesthetic value of the home.

title: Lime Wash Accent Wall | Interior Paint Feature in Park City, UT
description: This project featured a custom lime wash application on an interior accent wall in a Park City, Utah home, designed to create a soft, textured focal point
body: This project featured a custom lime wash application on an interior accent wall in a Park City, Utah home, designed to create a soft, textured focal point within the space. As part of a specialty interior paint upgrade, the lime wash finish was selected for its natural depth, tonal variation, and timeless aesthetic. Proper surface preparation was essential to achieving the desired result. The wall was carefully prepped to ensure even absorption and strong adhesion prior to product application. Using professional lime wash materials and layered brush techniques, the finish was built gradually to create the signature movement and cloud-like texture that defines this decorative interior paint style. Each layer was applied with attention to variation and balance, allowing the wall to develop a rich, dimensional appearance that shifts subtly with lighting throughout the day. The end result adds warmth, texture, and architectural interest while maintaining a breathable, matte finish suited for elevated interiors. This Park City project highlights our expertise in specialty interior services and our ability to deliver custom decorative finishes that enhance and personalize residential spaces.

title: Interior Drywall Repair & Painting | Park City, UT
description: This interior drywall repair and interior painting was completed in a Park City, Utah residence, focusing on restoring damaged wall surfaces and deliverin
body: This interior drywall repair and interior painting was completed in a Park City, Utah residence, focusing on restoring damaged wall surfaces and delivering a seamless, finished appearance throughout the space. The scope included repairing drywall imperfections prior to full interior paint application to ensure a smooth and uniform final result. All damaged areas were carefully addressed, including patching holes, repairing seams, correcting surface irregularities, and sanding for proper texture blending. Once repairs were completed, surfaces were primed as needed to create an even base and prevent flashing or sheen variation. Premium interior paint products were then applied to walls and surrounding areas, providing consistent coverage, clean lines, and long-lasting durability. Attention to detail throughout both the repair and paint phases ensured the finished surfaces blended flawlessly with the rest of the interior. This project highlights the importance of proper drywall preparation in achieving professional interior paint results and reflects our commitment to detailed craftsmanship in residential homes throughout Park City.

title: Primary Bedroom & Bathroom Drywall Repair and Interior Paint | Promontory
description: This project took place in the highly sought-after, high-end community of Promontory in Park City, where attention to detail and quality workmanship are e
body: This project took place in the highly sought-after, high-end community of Promontory in Park City, where attention to detail and quality workmanship are especially important. The work began with repairing drywall damage in a primary bedroom and adjoining bathroom, where walls had developed imperfections from normal wear, minor damage, and settling over time. The goal was to fully restore the surfaces before applying interior paint. Drywall repairs included patching damaged areas, smoothing uneven sections, and carefully blending textures so the repaired spots matched the surrounding walls. After sanding and preparing the surfaces, primer was applied where needed to ensure proper adhesion and a consistent final appearance. Once the repair phase was complete, interior paint was applied throughout the primary bedroom and bathroom. Careful cutting, even coverage, and detailed finish work helped create clean transitions between walls, ceilings, and trim. The completed paintwork refreshed both spaces and ensured the repaired areas blended seamlessly with the rest of the room. Projects like this highlight the importance of thorough preparation and precision when working in upscale homes, delivering results that meet the expectations of homeowners in communities like Promontory.

title: Kitchen Cabinet Refinishing | Interior Upgrade in Park City, UT
description: This kitchen cabinetry & wood refinishing project focused on restoring and updating existing cabinetry to create a clean, modern look without replacin
body: This kitchen cabinetry & wood refinishing project focused on restoring and updating existing cabinetry to create a clean, modern look without replacing the original materials. Completed in a Park City, Utah home, the project required extensive preparation and precision application to achieve a smooth, durable, furniture-quality finish. The process began with removing doors and drawer fronts, followed by thorough cleaning and degreasing to eliminate buildup from years of daily use. All surfaces were carefully sanded and prepped to promote proper adhesion before applying a professional-grade primer and cabinet coating system. Using high-quality products specifically designed for cabinetry, multiple controlled coats were applied to ensure even coverage, consistent sheen, and long-term durability. Special attention was given to edges, profiles, and detailed areas to deliver crisp lines and a uniform finish throughout. The completed refinishing dramatically elevated the kitchen’s appearance, providing a refined, updated aesthetic while preserving the integrity of the existing cabinetry. This project highlights the value of expert preparation and craftsmanship in delivering premium cabinet refinishing results for homes in Park City and surrounding communities.
